creator: fred.ha11@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Andriy Gapon from comment #1)

I would like to give more info and the problem is 100% repeatable so your suggestions on debugging are welcome.

On boot, the console scrolls normally till a line beginning with ZFS, then the computer reboots instantly without displaying any more info. (black screen)

If On reboot I select kernel.old, the computer boot successfully.
